name: @mj-biz-apps/accounting-playwright-harness
description: Kept Playwright GUI harness for bizapps-accounting — drives the instance's MJExplorer (presence + behavior).
comment: Playwright + tsx are resolved from the hoisted MJ workspace root (packages/dev-apps/bizapps-accounting depends on the instance worktree). No local install is needed; if running outside the instance, `npm i -D @playwright/test tsx` here.
